---
title: "Linter Presets"
description: >
  This section provides a reference for the
  external linter presets available in Panache.
---

Read the [Configuration Guide](../guide/configuration.qmd#external-code-linters)
for instructions on how to configure external linters for code chunks in
Panache.

{{< include _linter-presets-details.qmd >}}
